description_long: This airplane features a highly angular, futuristic design with sharp, swept-back wings and a pointed nose, giving it a predatory, high-speed appearance. The wings are mid-mounted and sharply swept, with additional downward-angled stabilizers or fins extending from both the main body and the wingtips. The color scheme is a striking combination of deep blue and metallic gray, with glossy surfaces that reflect light. The fuselage is slender and tapers to a fine point at the front, while the rear is flanked by large, triangular vertical stabilizers. No visible engines or landing gear are apparent, suggesting a streamlined, possibly conceptual or sci-fi inspired aircraft. The cockpit area is integrated into the forward section of the fuselage, with a dark, tinted canopy blending seamlessly into the body.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with swept-back blue and gray wings, sharp fins, and a pointed nose, featuring a futuristic, high-speed design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, twin vertical stabilizers, and the sharply angled wings extending outward and upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the swept-back wings, downward-angled fins, and the elongated, aerodynamic fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large, triangular vertical stabilizers and the wide wingspan, with the tail section clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the sharp, angular wings and fins, as well as the streamlined body profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and prominent downward-angled fins; no visible winglets; pronounced anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a V-tail-like arrangement, sharply angled outward from the rear fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the nose section with a dark, seamless canopy.
